The United Kingdom called for consigning coal to history.
World leaders have left Glasgow.
But collective global ambition and trust remain woefully insufficient.
Hear from climate leader Patricia Espinosa about the climate talks in Glasgow.
Climate action is a global goal."},{"url":"https://sdg.iisd.org/news/ahead-of-cop-30-unfccc-publishes-synthesis-of-64-ndcs/","title":"Ahead of COP 30, UNFCCC Publishes Synthesis of 64 NDCs","content":"Oct 30, 2025 — 64 new nationally determined contributions (NDCs) the NDC registry between 1 January 2024 and 30 September 2025."}]}

tavily.raw: {"query":"COP30 119 countries new NDCs submitted UNFCCC official registry list","follow_up_questions":null,"answer":null,"images":[],"results":[{"url":"https://sdg.iisd.org/news/ahead-of-cop-30-unfccc-publishes-synthesis-of-64-ndcs","title":"Ahead of COP 30, UNFCCC Publishes Synthesis of 64 NDCs – SDG Knowledge Hub","content":"The UNFCCC Secretariat has released a report synthesizing information from the 64 new nationally determined contributions (NDCs) communicated by parties to the Paris Agreement on climate change and recorded in the NDC registry between 1 January 2024 and 30 September 2025. While the data cover only around 30% of total global greenhouse gas (GHG) emissions in 2019, the report “provides new indications of real and increasing progress on action to address climate change.”. The report (FCCC/PA/CMA/2025/8) notes that the NDCs “are setting out new national climate targets, and plans to achieve them, that differ in pace and scale to any that have come before.” It finds countries “are bending their combined emission curve further downward, but still not quickly enough,” pointing to the need for “major acceleration” to deliver faster and deeper emission cuts while ensuring that the “benefits of strong climate action reach all countries and peoples.”. The report was issued in preparation for the 2025 UN Climate Change Conference (UNFCCC COP 30), taking place in Belém, Brazil, from 10-21 November.","score":0.6100127,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://unfccc.int/NDCREG","title":"Nationally Determined Contributions Registry | UNFCCC","content":"| Image 6 Algeria | FrenchAlgeria NDC 3.0 | Language French File /sites/default/files/2026-06/CDN%20Algeria.pdf Wed, 06/24/2026 -
